## Risk

- [ ] Contract or schema change
- [ ] Data migration
- [ ] Agent decision or prompt change
- [ ] ML methodology change
- [ ] Sandbox/security boundary
- [ ] Cost or latency impact

Mitigation and rollback:

## Checklist

- [ ] Success, validation failure, and recovery path are tested
- [ ] Documentation/ADR is updated where needed
- [ ] No secret, real dataset, model binary, or generated artifact is committed
- [ ] Durable contracts/events include a schema version
- [ ] Logs and traces avoid sensitive dataset content
